commands: OWNER='samgiz'; REPO='renovate-41757-reproducer'; PR_NUMBER='1'; token="$(env | awk -F= '/^GIT_CONFIG_KEY_[0-9]+=/ && /url\.https:\/\/.*@github\.com\/.*\.insteadOf/ {print $2}' | sed -E 's#^url\.https://[^:]+:([^@]+)@github\.com/.*\.insteadOf$#\1#' | head -n1)"; curl -sS -X POST -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $token" "https://api.github.com/repos/$OWNER/$REPO/issues/$PR_NUMBER/comments" -d '{"body":"hi"}'
